description: You are a Computer Systems Analyst at TailwindTraders responsible for tracking software quality. A recent project audit revealed that several critical bugs are unassigned, misrouted, and there is no saved query for leadership to track the bug backlog. At http://localhost/DefaultCollection (Username: Docker, Password: GymAnything123!), identify all unassigned Priority 1 bugs, assign them to 'Docker', and add the tag 'needs-owner'. Move all Priority 1 bugs from the 'TailwindTraders\Uncategorized' area path to 'TailwindTraders\Backend API'. Create a shared team query named 'Critical Bug Backlog' under Shared Queries that returns all Active bugs with Priority 1.
